# Desert Peak Heating & Cooling

> Locally owned HVAC company serving Henderson and the greater Las Vegas Valley since 2009. Air conditioning repair, installation, heating, indoor air quality, and commercial HVAC, with same-day service and upfront, honest pricing.

Fully licensed Nevada HVAC contractor (NSCB #0089421) with NATE-certified, background-checked technicians and a 100% satisfaction guarantee. Desert Peak is a fictional company built as a trial project.

## Contact

- Phone: (555) 555-0182
- Email: service@desertpeakhvac.com
- Address: 1480 W Sunset Rd, Suite 120, Henderson, NV 89014
- Hours: Monday to Friday 7am to 7pm; Saturday 8am to 4pm; Sunday emergency service only

## Services

- AC Repair & Maintenance: fast diagnostics and repairs, plus tune-ups that prevent breakdowns
- Air Conditioning Installation: high-efficiency systems sized for the Nevada climate
- Heating Services: furnace and heat pump repair, maintenance, and installation
- Indoor Air Quality: air purifiers, filtration, and duct cleaning
- Commercial HVAC: service and maintenance plans for offices, retail, and light industrial

## Service area

Henderson, Green Valley, Anthem, Las Vegas, Summerlin, Boulder City, North Las Vegas, Enterprise, Spring Valley

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://desert-peak-hvac-rouge.vercel.app/): services, service area, customer reviews, and contact form
- [Content Studio](https://desert-peak-hvac-rouge.vercel.app/studio): Sanity CMS for editing site content
